data.title: Rollo X1038 Thermal Label Printer 4x6 USB With Power Supply + Labels Included
data.description:
I upgraded to a Zebra ZD420 and this Rollo is looking for a new home. It's a solid, no-nonsense label printer that works exactly as advertised. Fully tested and working, great condition.

Printer | Rollo X1038 Direct Thermal
Connection | USB-B
Print Width | 4x6
Condition | Used, fully functional, great cosmetic condition
Includes | Power supply, USB cable, ~50 label starter pack

All my listings ship with free shipping for your ease, none of this $30 shipping on a 1 pound item. I price my listings fairly but please feel free to make an offer.

Sold As Is.
data.condition_field: Used, fully functional. Tested working. Includes original power supply, USB cable, and approximately 50 thermal labels to get started. Great condition cosmetically — no major scratches or damage. Upgraded to a Zebra, no longer needed.
